headlines.headline: Jorvis Fuels warns of supply chain disruptions affecting North America operations

sentiment.reasoning: Supply chain disruptions directly threaten operational efficiency and revenue realization in the near term.

headlines.headline: Wyrnor Solutions reports record quarterly revenue, up 20% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record revenue growth provides strong positive momentum for both immediate investor sentiment and sustained financial performance.

headlines.headline: Jorvis Fuels begins scheduled maintenance of wireless connectivity systems

headlines.headline: Wyrnor Solutions CTO steps down unexpectedly citing personal reasons

sentiment.reasoning: The unexpected departure of a key technical leader creates immediate uncertainty regarding strategic direction and operational continuity.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
